description: Build a parametric conceptual model of a Wing-In-Ground (WIG) effect coastal ferry from scratch. An engineering specification document with exact dimensions is located at /home/ga/Desktop/airfish_wig_spec.txt. Read this file first. You must create a multi-component model featuring: (1) A Fuselage. (2) A Main Wing with a downward-pointing outboard section (negative dihedral of -90°) to act as a ground-effect endplate. (3) A Vertical Tail with its planar symmetry disabled (single surface). (4) A Horizontal Tail elevated to a Z-location >= 3.5m to form a T-tail. Save the final model exactly to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/wig_concept.vsp3.
